_publications._publicationTitle: In vivo synaptic transmission and morphology in mouse models of Tuberous sclerosis, Fragile X syndrome, Neurofibromatosis type 1, and Costello syndrome.

_contextSnippet: We found some evidence that EPSP-AP coupling was stronger in the NF1 mice, but this was not observed in the CS mouse
details: Some evidence that EPSP-AP coupling was stronger in the NF1 mice
